meta.title: SzelTech – Precision CNC Turning & Milling | Hungary
meta.description: Professional CNC turning and milling services in Hungary. Custom and series production, rush orders welcome. Reliable partner in industrial manufacturing.
meta.keywords: CNC turning, CNC milling, Hungary, part manufacturing, metalworking, welding, machine elements

privacy.meta_description: Privacy policy and data protection information for the SzelTech website.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: Szélig Zoltán Sole Proprietorship (hereinafter: Data Controller) is committed to protecting personal data and complying with GDPR regulations. This policy aims to provide detailed information about how we handle the data you provide.

data_collected.title: Data Collected
data_collected.content: Through the contact form, we collect the following data:

purpose.title: Purpose of Data Processing
purpose.content: The data you provide is used solely for responding to your inquiry and preparing quotations. We do not use the data for marketing purposes and do not share it with third parties.

legal_basis.title: Legal Basis
legal_basis.content: The legal basis for data processing is your voluntary consent (GDPR Article 6(1)(a)), which you provide by submitting the contact form.

storage.title: Data Storage
storage.content: The data you provide is stored electronically on secure servers. We retain the data for a maximum of 1 year after processing your inquiry, or delete it upon your request.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: Regarding data processing, you have the following rights:
items: Access: you can request information about the data we process
Rectification: you can request correction of your data
Erasure: you can request deletion of your data
Restriction: you can request restriction of processing
Objection: you can object to data processing

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have any questions about data processing or wish to exercise any of your rights, please contact us at szeligfem@gmail.com.

hero.subtitle: Custom and serial CNC part manufacturing to the highest quality standards. Rush orders welcome — flexible and fast.

machines.title: Our Machine Park and
machines.description: Our company has extensive experience in machining, and our machine park enables the precise and cost-effective production of small and large series components.

cnc_lathe_small.title: CNC Lathe
specs: Economical production of smaller parts and large series

about.title: A team
about.p1: Our focus is on long-term, reliable partnerships. We respond flexibly to our partners' needs, whether it's urgent work or special, custom orders.
about.p2: Focused on deadlines and quality, our future partners can be confident that they are working with a team built on expertise and flexibility, ready to deliver.
about.p3: Our experience in CNC turning and milling guarantees that every project is carried out to the highest quality standards.
about.mini: Our future partners can be confident that they are working with a skilled and flexible team when fast and precise solutions are required.

services.title: What we
services.description: Complete solutions from manufacturing to assembly.

cnc_forgacsolas.title: CNC Machining
cnc_forgacsolas.description: Precise CNC turning and milling for small, medium, and larger production series, including quantities of several thousand units, as well as custom components.

femipar.title: Metal Assembly and Welding Services
femipar.description: Supporting metalworking operations as part of the manufacturing and assembly process.

gepelemek.title: Machine Elements and Functional Subassemblies
gepelemek.description: Manufacturing and assembly of complete machine elements and functional subassemblies using parts produced in-house.

komplex.title: Complete Solutions from a Single Source
komplex.description: Reliable and flexible execution from manufacturing through to assembly.

portfolio.title: Completed
portfolio.description: A few examples of our machining projects.

contact.title: Get in
contact.description: Have a question or custom request? Send us a message and our team will get back to you shortly!
contact.quote: Precision machining, on-time delivery — we guarantee this in every project.

errors.name: Please enter a valid name (minimum 2 characters)
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address
errors.message: Message must be at least 10 characters long
errors.privacy: Accepting the privacy policy is required
errors.general: An error occurred while sending the message. Please try again later.

success.title: Message Sent!
success.message: Thank you for reaching out! We will get back to you shortly.

footer.tagline: CNC turning and milling. A reliable partner in industrial part manufacturing.
